title: USTR Announces Initiation of Section 301 Investigation of Brazilâ€™s Unfair Trading Practices
content: The Office of the United States Trade Representative initiated an investigation of Brazil under Section 301 of the Trade Act of 1974. The investigation will seek to determine whether acts, policies, and practices of the Government of Brazil related to digital trade and electronic payment services; unfair, preferential tariffs; anti-corruption interference; intellectual property protection; ethanol market access; and illegal deforestation are unreasonable or discriminatory and burden or restrict U.S. commerce.
author: Analysts Account
source: Office of the United States Trade Representative
